description: Dashboard for RUM events collected by OTEL web agents
title: [RUM OTel] Page Load & WebVitals

config.content: This dashboard provides an overview of your web applications performance and health, including number of visits, page load times and top errors. Use it to monitor your web applications instrumented by the OpenTelemetry JS SDK.
config.title: OpenTelemetry RUM

data_source.query:
FROM traces-*.otel-* 
| WHERE service.name IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?service_name, service.name)
| WHERE resource.attributes.user_agent.original IS NOT NULL
| USER_AGENT userAgent = resource.attributes.user_agent.original
| WHERE MV_CONTAINS(?browser, userAgent.name)
| WHERE MV_CONTAINS(?os, userAgent.os.name)
| WHERE resource.attributes.telemetry.sdk.language == "webjs" 
    AND scope.attributes.service.framework.name == "@opentelemetry/instrumentation-document-load" 
    AND transaction.name == "documentLoad"
| STATS `Total Visits` = COUNT(*)

FROM traces-*.otel-* 
| WHERE service.name IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?service_name, service.name)
| WHERE resource.attributes.user_agent.original IS NOT NULL
| USER_AGENT userAgent = resource.attributes.user_agent.original
| WHERE MV_CONTAINS(?browser, userAgent.name)
| WHERE MV_CONTAINS(?os, userAgent.os.name)
| WHERE resource.attributes.telemetry.sdk.language == "webjs" 
    AND scope.attributes.service.framework.name == "@opentelemetry/instrumentation-document-load" 
    AND transaction.name == "documentLoad"
| STATS `Load Median` = MEDIAN(transaction.duration.us)

FROM traces-*.otel-* 
| WHERE service.name IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?service_name, service.name)
| WHERE resource.attributes.user_agent.original IS NOT NULL
| USER_AGENT userAgent = resource.attributes.user_agent.original
| WHERE MV_CONTAINS(?browser, userAgent.name)
| WHERE MV_CONTAINS(?os, userAgent.os.name)
| WHERE resource.attributes.telemetry.sdk.language == "webjs" 
    AND scope.attributes.service.framework.name == "@opentelemetry/instrumentation-document-load" 
    AND transaction.name == "documentLoad"
| STATS `95th percentile` = PERCENTILE(transaction.duration.us, 95)

FROM traces-*.otel-* 
| WHERE service.name IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?service_name, service.name)
| WHERE resource.attributes.user_agent.original IS NOT NULL
| USER_AGENT userAgent = resource.attributes.user_agent.original
| WHERE MV_CONTAINS(?browser, userAgent.name)
| WHERE MV_CONTAINS(?os, userAgent.os.name)
| WHERE resource.attributes.telemetry.sdk.language == "webjs" 
    AND scope.attributes.service.framework.name == "@opentelemetry/instrumentation-document-load" 
    AND transaction.name == "documentLoad"
| STATS `Total Visits` = COUNT(*) BY Time = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)

FROM traces-*.otel-* 
| WHERE service.name IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?service_name, service.name)
| WHERE resource.attributes.user_agent.original IS NOT NULL
| USER_AGENT userAgent = resource.attributes.user_agent.original
| WHERE MV_CONTAINS(?browser, userAgent.name)
| WHERE MV_CONTAINS(?os, userAgent.os.name)
| WHERE resource.attributes.telemetry.sdk.language == "webjs" 
    AND scope.attributes.service.framework.name == "@opentelemetry/instrumentation-document-load" 
    AND transaction.name == "documentLoad"
| STATS bucket_count = COUNT(attributes.transaction.duration.us) BY Duration = BUCKET(transaction.duration.us, 10000)

config.title: Top Errors
config.description: This table displays the top errors grouped by similarity in the stack trace.

data_source.query:
FROM logs-*.otel-* METADATA _index 
| WHERE service.name IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?service_name, service.name)
| WHERE resource.attributes.user_agent.original IS NOT NULL
| USER_AGENT userAgent = resource.attributes.user_agent.original
| WHERE MV_CONTAINS(?browser, userAgent.name)
| WHERE MV_CONTAINS(?os, userAgent.os.name)
| WHERE resource.attributes.telemetry.sdk.language == "webjs"
 | WHERE attributes.exception.message IS NOT NULL
 | STATS `COUNT`=COUNT(*), example=SAMPLE(attributes.exception.message, 1), browser=SAMPLE(resource.attributes.browser.name, 1) BY ERROR=CATEGORIZE(attributes.exception.stacktrace)
 | SORT COUNT DESC

FROM traces-*.otel-* 
| WHERE service.name IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?service_name, service.name)
| WHERE resource.attributes.user_agent.original IS NOT NULL
| USER_AGENT userAgent = resource.attributes.user_agent.original
| WHERE MV_CONTAINS(?browser, userAgent.name)
| WHERE MV_CONTAINS(?os, userAgent.os.name)
| WHERE resource.attributes.telemetry.sdk.language == "webjs" 
    AND scope.attributes.service.framework.name == "@opentelemetry/instrumentation-document-load" 
    AND transaction.name == "documentLoad"
| STATS bucket_count = COUNT(*) BY Browser = browser.name

FROM traces-*.otel-* 
| WHERE service.name IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?service_name, service.name)
| WHERE resource.attributes.user_agent.original IS NOT NULL
| USER_AGENT userAgent = resource.attributes.user_agent.original
| WHERE MV_CONTAINS(?browser, userAgent.name)
| WHERE MV_CONTAINS(?os, userAgent.os.name)
| WHERE resource.attributes.telemetry.sdk.language == "webjs" 
    AND scope.attributes.service.framework.name == "@opentelemetry/instrumentation-document-load" 
    AND transaction.name == "documentLoad"
| STATS bucket_count = COUNT(*) BY OS = browser.platform

FROM traces-*.otel-* 
| WHERE service.name IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?service_name, service.name)
| WHERE resource.attributes.user_agent.original IS NOT NULL
| USER_AGENT userAgent = resource.attributes.user_agent.original
| WHERE MV_CONTAINS(?browser, userAgent.name)
| WHERE MV_CONTAINS(?os, userAgent.os.name)
| WHERE resource.attributes.telemetry.sdk.language == "webjs" 
    AND scope.attributes.service.framework.name == "@opentelemetry/instrumentation-document-load" 
    AND transaction.name == "documentLoad"
| STATS `99th percentile` = PERCENTILE(transaction.duration.us, 99)

FROM logs-*.otel-*
| WHERE service.name IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?service_name, service.name)
| WHERE resource.attributes.user_agent.original IS NOT NULL
| USER_AGENT userAgent = resource.attributes.user_agent.original
| WHERE MV_CONTAINS(?browser, userAgent.name)
| WHERE MV_CONTAINS(?os, userAgent.os.name)
| WHERE browser.web_vital.name == "lcp"
| STATS lcp = ??agg_func(browser.web_vital.value)::double
| EVAL max_val = CASE(lcp > 6000.0, lcp*1.1, 6000.0)

FROM logs-*.otel-*
| WHERE service.name IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?service_name, service.name)
| WHERE resource.attributes.user_agent.original IS NOT NULL
| USER_AGENT userAgent = resource.attributes.user_agent.original
| WHERE MV_CONTAINS(?browser, userAgent.name)
| WHERE MV_CONTAINS(?os, userAgent.os.name)
| WHERE browser.web_vital.name == "lcp"
| STATS `min` = MIN(browser.web_vital.value),
    `avg` = AVG(browser.web_vital.value),
    `max` = MAX(browser.web_vital.value) BY Time = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)

FROM logs-*.otel-*
| WHERE service.name IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?service_name, service.name)
| WHERE resource.attributes.user_agent.original IS NOT NULL
| USER_AGENT userAgent = resource.attributes.user_agent.original
| WHERE MV_CONTAINS(?browser, userAgent.name)
| WHERE MV_CONTAINS(?os, userAgent.os.name)
| WHERE browser.web_vital.name == "inp"
| STATS inp = ??agg_func(browser.web_vital.value)::double
| EVAL max_val = CASE(inp > 750.0, inp * 1.1, 750.0)
| EVAL min_val = 0

FROM logs-*.otel-*
| WHERE service.name IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?service_name, service.name)
| WHERE resource.attributes.user_agent.original IS NOT NULL
| USER_AGENT userAgent = resource.attributes.user_agent.original
| WHERE MV_CONTAINS(?browser, userAgent.name)
| WHERE MV_CONTAINS(?os, userAgent.os.name)
| WHERE browser.web_vital.name == "inp"
| STATS `min` = MIN(browser.web_vital.value),
    `avg` = AVG(browser.web_vital.value),
    `max` = MAX(browser.web_vital.value) BY Time = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)

FROM logs-*.otel-*
| WHERE service.name IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?service_name, service.name)
| WHERE resource.attributes.user_agent.original IS NOT NULL
| USER_AGENT userAgent = resource.attributes.user_agent.original
| WHERE MV_CONTAINS(?browser, userAgent.name)
| WHERE MV_CONTAINS(?os, userAgent.os.name)
| WHERE browser.web_vital.name == "cls"
| STATS cls = ??agg_func(browser.web_vital.value)::double
| EVAL max_val = CASE(cls > 0.4, cls * 1.1, 0.4)
| EVAL min_val = 0

FROM logs-*.otel-*
| WHERE service.name IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?service_name, service.name)
| WHERE resource.attributes.user_agent.original IS NOT NULL
| USER_AGENT userAgent = resource.attributes.user_agent.original
| WHERE MV_CONTAINS(?browser, userAgent.name)
| WHERE MV_CONTAINS(?os, userAgent.os.name)
| WHERE browser.web_vital.name == "cls"
| STATS `min` = MIN(browser.web_vital.value),
    `avg` = AVG(browser.web_vital.value),
    `max` = MAX(browser.web_vital.value) BY Time = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)

FROM logs-*.otel-*
| WHERE service.name IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?service_name, service.name)
| WHERE resource.attributes.user_agent.original IS NOT NULL
| USER_AGENT userAgent = resource.attributes.user_agent.original
| WHERE MV_CONTAINS(?browser, userAgent.name)
| WHERE MV_CONTAINS(?os, userAgent.os.name)
| WHERE browser.web_vital.name == "fcp"
| STATS fcp = ??agg_func(browser.web_vital.value)::double
| EVAL max_val = CASE(fcp > 5000.0, fcp * 1.1, 5000.0)

FROM logs-*.otel-*
| WHERE service.name IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?service_name, service.name)
| WHERE resource.attributes.user_agent.original IS NOT NULL
| USER_AGENT userAgent = resource.attributes.user_agent.original
| WHERE MV_CONTAINS(?browser, userAgent.name)
| WHERE MV_CONTAINS(?os, userAgent.os.name)
| WHERE browser.web_vital.name == "fcp"
| STATS `min` = MIN(browser.web_vital.value),
    `avg` = AVG(browser.web_vital.value),
    `max` = MAX(browser.web_vital.value) BY Time = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)

FROM logs-*.otel-*
| WHERE service.name IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?service_name, service.name)
| WHERE resource.attributes.user_agent.original IS NOT NULL
| USER_AGENT userAgent = resource.attributes.user_agent.original
| WHERE MV_CONTAINS(?browser, userAgent.name)
| WHERE MV_CONTAINS(?os, userAgent.os.name)
| WHERE browser.web_vital.name == "ttfb"
| STATS ttfb = ??agg_func(browser.web_vital.value)::double
| EVAL max_val = CASE(ttfb > 2500.0, ttfb * 1.1, 2500.0), min_val = 0

FROM logs-*.otel-*
| WHERE service.name IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?service_name, service.name)
| WHERE resource.attributes.user_agent.original IS NOT NULL
| USER_AGENT userAgent = resource.attributes.user_agent.original
| WHERE MV_CONTAINS(?browser, userAgent.name)
| WHERE MV_CONTAINS(?os, userAgent.os.name)
| WHERE browser.web_vital.name == "ttfb"
| STATS `min` = MIN(browser.web_vital.value),
    `avg` = AVG(browser.web_vital.value),
    `max` = MAX(browser.web_vital.value) BY Time = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)

config.esql_query:
FROM logs-*.otel-* 
| WHERE @timestamp <= ?_tend and @timestamp > ?_tstart 
| WHERE telemetry.sdk.language  == "webjs"
| STATS BY service.name

FROM logs-*.otel-* 
| WHERE @timestamp <= ?_tend and @timestamp > ?_tstart
| WHERE telemetry.sdk.language  == "webjs"
| WHERE service.name IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?service_name, service.name)
| USER_AGENT userAgent = resource.attributes.user_agent.original
| STATS BY userAgent.name

FROM logs-*.otel-* 
| WHERE @timestamp <= ?_tend and @timestamp > ?_tstart
| WHERE telemetry.sdk.language  == "webjs"
| WHERE service.name IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?service_name, service.name)
| USER_AGENT userAgent = resource.attributes.user_agent.original
| STATS BY userAgent.os.name
